# kenbuilds.tech — Ken Patrick Garcia, AI Full-Stack Engineer

> I ship production AI systems — RAG, agents, and the full stack around them.
> Metro Manila, PH · open to AI engineering roles · kenpatrickgarcia123@gmail.com

Proof: Champion — C(Old) St.art Hackathon 2025 (FlowFit) · Top 13 of 500+ —
DEVAKDA, shipped Android v1.0.0 (Kudlit) · 1st Runner-Up — InfoTech
Olympics 2025 (Pacebeats) · Beacon — persistent-memory research agent,
shipped solo.

## Pages

- [Home](https://kenbuilds.tech/): hero, shipped work, the lab, talks, contact
- [LexInSight case study](https://kenbuilds.tech/work/lexinsight): legal RAG — pgvector retrieval, RLS isolation, dual-mode compliance checks
- [Beacon case study](https://kenbuilds.tech/work/beacon): research agent with persistent memory (Vercel AI SDK)
- [Pacebeats case study](https://kenbuilds.tech/work/pacebeats): WearOS biometric music — hybrid rule+ML recommender
- [Résumé](https://kenbuilds.tech/resume): PII-free recruiter résumé (PDF at /Ken-Patrick-Garcia-Resume.pdf)

## Facts

- Current: AI Full-Stack Engineer at Romega Solutions (Jul 2025–present, remote)
- Homelab: MacBook Air M4 16GB (dev) · ASUS 40GB RAM Ubuntu 24.04 running
  Ollama (Gemma, Qwen Coder) + Open WebUI (local inference) · ThinkVision
  T27h-30 27" QHD · Galaxy A26 (Android test device)
- Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector), FastAPI,
  Redis, n8n (self-hosted), Claude API, Docker
- Speaker: Qwen Meetup Manila #2 (Alibaba Cloud PH), 2026
- Education: BS Computer Science, University of Makati, expected 2026
